# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php
include 'db_connection.php';

function generate_report() {
    if (!isset($_POST['status']) && !isset($_POST['category'])) {
        return "Please select at least one filter.";
    }

    $start_date = $_POST['start_date'];
    $end_date = $_POST['end_date'];

    $sql = "SELECT * FROM your_table ";

    if (isset($_POST['status'])) {
        $sql .= "WHERE status IN (" . implode(',', $_POST['status']) . ")";
    }

    if (isset($_POST['category'])) {
        $sql .= " AND category IN (" . implode(',', $_POST['category']) . ")";
    }

    $sql .= " AND date BETWEEN '$start_date' AND '$end_date'";
    $sql .= " ORDER BY id DESC";

    try {
        $conn = new PDO("mysql:host=$servername;dbname=your_database", $username, $password);
        // set the PDO error mode to exception
        $conn->setAttribute(PDO::ATTR_ERRMODE, PDO::ERRMODE_EXCEPTION);

        $stmt = $conn->prepare($sql);
        $stmt->execute();

        $result = $stmt->fetchAll();
        return json_encode($result);

    } catch (PDOException $e) {
        return "Connection failed: " . $e->getMessage();
    }
}

if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] === 'POST') {
    $report = generate_report();
    echo $report;
}
?>
